## Checks

- [ ] I reviewed the canonical documents for the affected area.
- [ ] I did not duplicate existing canonical content.
- [ ] I updated indexes or documented why they were not changed.
- [ ] I did not add secrets, local env files, dumps, or generated archives.
- [ ] I ran available validation commands.
